message:
test(frankenpandas): add Concat: Full Options integration test (br-824wa / fd90.168)

fd90.168: locks in fd90.141's prelude expansion of the 5 concat
variants. The README's 'Concat: Full Options' section (lines
1210-1228) hadn't been integration-tested.

Builds two same-schema DataFrames (df1, df2 with a,b columns) and
one disjoint-schema (df3 with c,d) and exercises:
  - concat_dataframes(&[&df1, &df2])?                         → axis-0 stack, 4 rows
  - concat_dataframes_with_axis(&[&df1, &df3], 1)?            → axis-1 outer, 2 rows
  - concat_dataframes_with_axis_join(..., 1, Inner)?          → axis-1 inner, 2 rows
  - concat_dataframes_with_axis_join(&[&df1, &df2], 0, Inner)? → axis-0 inner, 4 rows
  - concat_dataframes_with_keys(..., &['train','test'])?      → hierarchical, 4 rows
  - concat_dataframes_with_ignore_index(..., true)?           → 4 rows reindexed

The initial test naively used df1+df2 (shared 'a','b' columns) for
axis=1 concat and got CompatibilityRejected('duplicate column a in
concat(axis=1) output'). Fixed by introducing df3 with disjoint
column names for the axis=1 cases — matches the README narrative
('add columns side-by-side').

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 14 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
